reviews.review_description:
So it’s good but there’s two problems with my account. 

1. When I try to claim my daily 250 gold, I look at how much money I have, it says 8 gold or something.

2. I think this is a glitch but it won't allow me to buy VIP and I really want to.

Please read and developers, please try to fix these glitches.

so me and my friend were in a call and we downloaded the game, the loading screen was cool and right when i joined i went to the shop and found out i got 1000 free coins :). right after that we joined a code and explored the lab i found out it had some cool secrets as we were in the cafeteria we immediately got jump scaring the crap out of me while i was laughing and when we went back to the cafeteria the monsters froze  and jump scared us once again. if you like horror monkey movement games this game is for you :)

reviews.review_title: Best game ever alive is creepy baboon
reviews.review_description:
The game is fun like the reason is the movement. It’s easier to get gold but in scary baboon you need to load in and do hard tasks. but the bad part is like you can’t go past people in scary baboon. You can just run past people. It makes it more fun when you can’t run past people because if you can’t, you can get pulled out to the monster and annoying. Part is that I can’t run past people and they like make a barrier for me to like not get out and I get caught scary baboon it feels like you go slow but in creepy baboon if you like you’re going fast, you’re going fast. I just wanna know why green Gooby and the worm got removed. I wonder if echo is still in this game 


￼￼￼

This game is actually really cool, cool cosmetics and funny secrets in the game. The only thing I don’t like is the monsters get frozen and don’t move at all, and I don’t get my daily gold for some reason? but with all that aside the game is really good! If you like these funny platform games this is for you! (GAME IS EVEN BETTER WITH FRIENDS!!!!)

It's a good game but the people are horrible and disgusting and I think kids up to 6-5 years olds should not play this grown man being weird and talking bad and if parents seeing and there kids want to have this I think its better you don't let your little kids on this game I'm a kid myself but this game is good but sometimes bad people people in it

The game is really fun. The only thing that is bad is the child predators and the people who think your a girl and say weird things. But the game is really fun I quiet every game and started playing creepy baboon

Creepy Baboon is a really good VR horror GTag game and feels great, runs well, has a fun playerbase and no excessive paid cosmetics (and actually gives you a TON of money to spend on in-game cosmetics right off the rip) and is really easy to pick up and put down, but while there's the positives, there's almost the only con of the obnoxious moderators, who will go around randomly flinging people trying to enjoy their game or kick them out of lobbies either in attempts to get their own private pub (developers don't use their own private lobbies feature) or to just be obnoxious. To quote a YouTuber I watched, "Hate the man, love the game"

AWSOME GAME.

  honestly it is better th 
an scary baboon in my opinion there is honestly nothing bad about it good gameplay good monsters community is pretty good so far so I recommend it 5 STARS

Don't get me wrong it's an amazing game but like 2 minutes ago i met someone claiming to know the owner(they might of but i have no clue) and told me I was playing on the wrong version and I said "Oh i'm sorry ill update it right now" and i checked and my game and said to them "Sorry but my game doesn't need updated maybe its yours?" And they checked and the just went at me saying that it was my game and these were their excact word "Well don't play untill you can update it" And i said back "Well im sorry but is it physically impossible for me to update the game " and i restartwd my vr and it didnt work.

This game is already good enough with horror and a bit of humor but what makes the game even better is that it accepts everyone. Unlike most games this one(Creepy Baboon) has multiple different stuff for sexuality,style, and overall just a nice game( and almost all of the Players are nice,pretty funny, and kinda mature(they know to not be rude about sexuality and other stuff). In simple terms good game, good stuff in the game, and a good and pretty mature fanbase.

This game is a perfect example, it feels like it abuses the trope of gorilla tag movement. Not to mention every monster feels like it's just a burden, not a threat. Plus it feels like a worse scary baboon copy, but at least scary baboon sometimes is scary. I hope everyone who actually enjoys this game realizes that it's sloppy and just very bad in general.
